'''vavama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reaction|reaction]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reaction|reaction]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vavama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vævæmæth|vævæmæth]] || [[word:vævæmæj|vævæmæj]] || [[word:vævæmæsh|vævæmæsh]] || [[word:vævæmæ|vævæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vavavamath|vavavamath]] || [[word:vavavamaj|vavavamaj]] || [[word:vavavamash|vavavamash]] || [[word:vavavama|vavavama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vavamath|vavamath]] || [[word:vavamaj|vavamaj]] || [[word:vavamash|vavamash]] || [[word:vavama|vavama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vavafmath|vavafmath]] || [[word:vavafmaj|vavafmaj]] || [[word:vavafmash|vavafmash]] || [[word:vavafmaf|vavafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vavamatha|vavamatha]] || [[word:vavamaja|vavamaja]] || [[word:vavamasha|vavamasha]] || [[word:vavamaka|vavamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vavamath|vavamath]] || [[word:vavamaj|vavamaj]] || [[word:vavamash|vavamash]] || [[word:vavama|vavama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vavamathal|vavamathal]] || [[word:vavamajal|vavamajal]] || [[word:vavamashal|vavamashal]] || [[word:vavamakal|vavamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vavamathatha|vavamathatha]] || [[word:vavamajaja|vavamajaja]] || [[word:vavamashasha|vavamashasha]] || [[word:vavamaka|vavamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vavamathan|vavamathan]] || [[word:vavamajan|vavamajan]] || [[word:vavamashan|vavamashan]] || [[word:vavamakan|vavamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vavamathaoro|vavamathaoro]] || [[word:vavamajaoro|vavamajaoro]] || [[word:vavamashaoro|vavamashaoro]] || [[word:vavamakaoro|vavamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
